description_long: This helmet features a rounded, sky-blue shell with three prominent pink stripes running from front to back. The front is equipped with a large, slightly curved amber-tinted visor that covers the face area, providing both protection and visibility. On each side, there are circular, metallic-looking earpieces with pink accent lines and attached black and pink chin straps for securing the helmet. Two thin, black antennae extend vertically from the sides, adding a futuristic or communication-oriented touch. The rear of the helmet displays a cartoonish monkey face graphic and stylized red text, enhancing its playful and urban appeal. The overall design combines retro and modern elements, making it visually striking and suitable for urban environments.
description: A sky-blue helmet with pink stripes, an amber visor, side earpieces, antennae, and playful graphics on the back. The design is both retro and futuristic, with bold visual accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the amber visor, pink stripes, and both antennae clearly, with the chin straps visible below.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the circular earpiece, antenna, and the curvature of the visor, with pink accent lines visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the cartoon monkey graphic, red text, and the three pink stripes running over the top.
description_view_3: Left-side view mirrors the right, showing the earpiece, antenna, and the visor's edge, with chin strap details.
attribute_brand_logo: A cartoon monkey face graphic is present on the rear left side of the helmet, above stylized red text. No recognizable commercial brand logo is visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features three pink stripes, a cartoon monkey face, stylized red text, and pink accent lines, giving it a playful, urban, and slightly retro-futuristic look.
